visual_description: Two men sit at a small round table in a café setting; the man on the left wears a red plaid shirt and gestures with his hands while speaking, the man on the right wears a black long-sleeved shirt with arms crossed and looks toward the other man. Behind them, other patrons are visible, and the background includes festive decorations and a chalkboard with writing. Both men are seated, facing each other, with mugs and a small container on the table between them.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking clearly without any noticeable background noise or inflection.
